info.title: Novel Platform API
info.description: Versioned REST contract for the novel platform backend. Browser clients use the same-origin Next BFF: replace the backend prefix `/api/v1` with `/api/novel` for the `public`, `account`, `author`, and `admin` route groups. The BFF owns browser cookies, CSRF validation, and the upstream internal headers; do not call protected backend routes from browser JavaScript directly. `/api/v1/auth/*` is an internal BFF-to-backend contract and is intentionally not exposed by the catch-all browser proxy. This contract describes implemented local platform behavior only. Phone/email verification, WeChat/QQ OAuth, external payment, and production Qwen credentials are not represented as available API integrations.

servers.description: Backend service. Protected and auth routes require BFF-only headers.

tags.name: Public discovery
tags.description: Anonymous catalog and visible interaction reads.

tags.name: Reader account
tags.description: Current-reader profile, reading state, and interactions.

tags.name: Author workspace
tags.description: Author-owned catalog, publication, analytics, and interaction reads.

tags.name: Operations
tags.description: Administrator-only review, account, taxonomy, code, and editorial operations.

tags.name: Internal BFF session
tags.description: Backend endpoints called only by the Next BFF session route.

post.description: `Idempotency-Key` is required, is scoped to this reward operation, and must be 128 characters or fewer. Amounts are platform tokens only, not fiat currency.

get.summary: List books owned by the current author

post.summary: Create an author-owned draft book
Upload a PNG or JPEG cover for an author-owned draft or rejected book
post.description: The browser sends multipart data only through the same-origin BFF, which retains its generated boundary and CSRF protection. The backend ignores the filename and declared MIME type, validates actual PNG/JPEG bytes and dimensions, stores a random managed object key, and returns only a relative `/media/` URL. Object-store endpoints and credentials are never part of this contract.

post.description: The returned normalized status can show a review-required state. This is not a browser-accessible Qwen provider API.

post.summary: Schedule a future chapter publication attempt
post.description: The due attempt still follows the configured automatic screening path; scheduling does not bypass moderation.

get.summary: Page all comment states for an author-owned book
Page all paragraph annotation states for an author-owned book
Get author-owned FR-08 analytics
get.description: Dates are inclusive `Asia/Shanghai` calendar days. Omitted dates select the service default bounded window. Subscription and retention explicitly report availability rather than inventing values.

get.summary: Page successful token rewards for author-owned books
get.description: `from` and `to` are inclusive `Asia/Shanghai` calendar days. The summary covers every matching successful token reward, not only the requested page. Amounts are tokens only.

get.summary: Get whole-platform and acquisition-channel D1/D7 reader retention
get.description: Cohorts are each reader's first durable reading-progress activity date. `asOf` makes historical eligibility reproducible; a cohort is eligible for D1/D7 only after that many Asia/Shanghai calendar days have elapsed. Attribution is a controlled first-touch registration category and defaults to DIRECT when absent. The report does not return raw IP addresses, referrers, campaign URLs, or device identifiers.

parameters.name: asOf
parameters.description: Defaults to the current Asia/Shanghai date; cannot be in the future.

post.summary: Create a password account and backend session
post.description: Internal BFF-to-backend route only. The browser uses `POST /api/novel/session` instead. This is username/password registration only; it does not provide phone/email verification or OAuth.

post.summary: Create a backend session from username/password credentials
post.description: Internal BFF-to-backend route only. The browser uses `POST /api/novel/session` instead. Authentication-write rate limiting is enforced by the BFF, not this controller.

get.summary: Resolve a backend BFF session to its user

post.summary: Revoke a backend BFF session

BffSession.name: novel_session
BffSession.description: Opaque browser BFF session cookie. The browser never receives the backend session id.

CsrfToken.name: X-Novel-CSRF
CsrfToken.description: Required by the BFF on unsafe browser requests and must match its CSRF cookie/session binding.

InternalBffKey.name: X-Novel-Internal-Key
InternalBffKey.description: Private BFF-to-backend credential. Never send this header from a browser.

BackendBffSession.name: X-Novel-Bff-Session
BackendBffSession.description: Server-side backend session credential held by the BFF only. Never expose it to browser code.

CategoryAlias.name: type
CategoryAlias.description: Compatibility alias used only when `category` is blank.

InteractionPageSize.name: size
InteractionPageSize.description: The controller accepts an interaction page size; callers should use a bounded value.

InteractionStatus.name: status
InteractionStatus.description: Optional stored comment or annotation status filter.

VoteType.name: type
VoteType.description: Vote type accepted by the current backend implementation.

file.description: Actual PNG or JPEG bytes; filename and declared MIME type are not trusted.

Unauthorized.description: Missing, expired, or invalid BFF session/internal BFF credential.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated principal lacks the required role or ownership.

NotFound.description: Requested resource does not exist or is not visible to the caller.

Conflict.description: Requested state transition conflicts with current durable state.

Unavailable.description: A required internal dependency is unavailable.

cover.description: A legacy CSS color or a server-generated relative `/media/covers/<uuid>.png|jpg` path; never an object-store endpoint.

RedeemResult.description: Current redemption result fields are benefit-dependent.

RewardResult.description: Reward result includes server-derived balance/state fields.

PurchaseResult.description: Purchase result includes server-derived entitlement/balance state.

contentVersionHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the immutable whole-work version; no work text is exposed.

sessionId.description: BFF-only backend session identifier; must not be written to browser cookies.

channel.description: Optional controlled first-touch registration channel. Unknown values are rejected; raw UTM URLs and referrers are not stored.
